creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
On Tue, Apr 15, 2014 at 01:46:12PM +0200, Tijl Coosemans wrote:
> Hi Julien,

Hello Tijl,

> 
> In the mapserver port Makefile around line 20 there's a line that says
> "USES= cmake".  Can you test if appending " iconv" to that line fixes
> this PR?

It works with:

USES=                   cmake iconv

Thanks for the fix and your quick reply !

Julien

-- 
No trees were killed in the creation of this message.
However, many electrons were terribly inconvenienced.
